creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
> after escaping these left braces manually, twirssi.pl runs as expected.

How about providing an actual patch that does this?

On the other hand there are several new releases [1].  It might be worthwhile
to update this port instead of patching it.  2.6.3 is 5 years out of date.
Does it even still work correctly with Twitter?

[1] http://www.twirssi.com/?history
